_comment: Tombstones are not sticky beyond their timestamp. A create OLDER than a delete stays deleted (no resurrection); a create NEWER than a delete revives the record.

lever:200.title: Platform Engineer
lever:200._won_from: C3D4 create @ 15:00 beats A1B2 delete @ 10:00 — revived

greenhouse:100._won_from: A1B2 delete @ 14:00 beats C3D4 create @ 12:00 — stays deleted
